eval_feedback.overall: All expectations failed due to the baseline agent refusing to answer. This is expected per the grading instructions. The eval itself is well-structured with clear, specific assertions that would discriminate between good and poor responses — background color, text color, icon type, padding, border radius, and conciseness are all meaningful design specifications that require accurate knowledge of the component. The comparison with the with_skill run (which produced a comprehensive 35-line answer covering all specs) demonstrates that a skill-enabled agent can successfully complete this task.
